_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Add tf2_kdl to the ros_base variant. (#16)

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@openrobotics.org>

files.patch:
@@ -12,9 +12,11 @@
   <exec_depend>ros_core</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- geometry2 repo -->
+  <!-- TODO(clalancette) switch to using geometry2 metapackage -->
   <exec_depend>tf2</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>tf2_eigen</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>tf2_geometry_msgs</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>tf2_kdl</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>tf2_ros</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- kdl_parser repo -->

data.author: ahcorde
data.message:
Removed action tutorials interfaces dependency (#44)

Signed-off-by: Alejandro Hernández Cordero <ahcorde@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,6 @@
 
   <!-- demos repo -->
   <exec_depend>action_tutorials_cpp</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>action_tutorials_interfaces</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>action_tutorials_py</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>composition</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>demo_nodes_cpp</exec_depend>

data.author: azeey
data.message:
Rename ros_ign to ros_gz (#43)

Signed-off-by: Addisu Z. Taddese <addisu@openrobotics.org>

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
   <exec_depend>desktop</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>perception</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>simulation</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros_ign_gazebo_demos</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_gz_sim_demos</exec_depend>
 
   <export>
     <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>

@@ -14,10 +14,10 @@
   <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
 
   <exec_depend>ros_base</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros_ign_bridge</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros_ign_gazebo</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros_ign_image</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros_ign_interfaces</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_gz_bridge</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_gz_sim</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_gz_image</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_gz_interfaces</exec_depend>
 
   <export>
     <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>

data.author: MartinPeris
data.message:
Use single quotes (#41)

Use single quotes instead of double quotes so the description message is displayed properly ('batteries included' instead of "batteries included")

Signed-off-by: Martin Peris <cosmoperis@gmail.com>

files.patch:

 <package format="2">
   <name>desktop_full</name>
   <version>0.10.0</version>
-  <description>Provides a "batteries included" experience to novice users.</description>
+  <description>Provides a 'batteries included' experience to novice users.</description>
 
   <maintainer email="geoff@openrobotics.org">Geoffrey Biggs</maintainer>

data.author: chapulina
data.message:
Desktop-full, perception and simulation variants (#34)

Signed-off-by: Louise Poubel <louise@openrobotics.org>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+
+project(desktop_full NONE)
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="2">
+  <name>desktop_full</name>
+  <version>0.9.3</version>
+  <description>Provides a "batteries included" experience to novice users.</description>
+  <maintainer email="louise@openrobotics.org">Louise Poubel</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache License 2.0</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>desktop</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>perception</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>simulation</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_ign_gazebo_demos</exec_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+
+project(perception NONE)
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="2">
+  <name>perception</name>
+  <version>0.9.3</version>
+  <description>A package which aggregates common perception packages.</description>
+  <maintainer email="louise@openrobotics.org">Louise Poubel</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache License 2.0</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>ros_base</exec_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>image_common</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>image_pipeline</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>image_transport_plugins</exec_depend>
+
+  <!-- No laser_pipeline on ROS 2 yet, break it up -->
+  <exec_depend>laser_filters</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>laser_geometry</exec_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>perception_pcl</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>vision_opencv</exec_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+
+project(simulation NONE)
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="2">
+  <name>simulation</name>
+  <version>0.9.3</version>
+  <description>A package which extends 'ros_base' and includes simulation packages.</description>
+  <maintainer email="louise@openrobotics.org">Louise Poubel</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache License 2.0</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>ros_base</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_ign_bridge</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_ign_gazebo</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_ign_image</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros_ign_interfaces</exec_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@
 
   <!-- rclcpp repo -->
   <exec_depend>rclcpp</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>rclcpp_action</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>rclcpp_lifecycle</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- rclpy repo -->

data.author: ymollard
data.message:
Replace ros2cli repo by ros2cli_common_extensions (#32)

* Replace ros2cli repo by ros2cli_common_extensions

files.patch:
@@ -58,20 +58,9 @@
   <exec_depend>launch_ros</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>launch_testing_ros</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2launch</exec_depend>
-
-  <!-- ros2cli repo -->
-  <exec_depend>ros2action</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2component</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2doctor</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2interface</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2lifecycle</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2multicast</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2node</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2param</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2pkg</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2run</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2service</exec_depend>
-  <exec_depend>ros2topic</exec_depend>
+  
+  <!-- ros2cli_common_extensions repo -->
+  <exec_depend>ros2cli_common_extensions</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- sros2 repo -->
   <exec_depend>sros2</exec_depend>

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# variants
+Variants for ROS 2 (implemented as ament packages)

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 <?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
 <package format="2">
   <name>desktop</name>
-  <version>0.8.2</version>
+  <version>0.8.3</version>
   <description>A package which extends 'ros_base' and includes high level packages like vizualization tools and demos.</description>
   <maintainer email="steven@openrobotics.org">Steven! Ragnarök</maintainer>
   <license>Apache License 2.0</license>

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 <?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
 <package format="2">
   <name>ros_base</name>
-  <version>0.8.2</version>
+  <version>0.8.3</version>
   <description>A package which extends 'ros_core' and includes other basic functionalities like tf2 and urdf.</description>
   <maintainer email="steven@openrobotics.org">Steven! Ragnarök</maintainer>
   <license>Apache License 2.0</license>

@@ -2,6 +2,11 @@
 Changelog for package ros_core
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 
+0.8.3 (2019-11-20)
+------------------
+* Add ros2doctor to ros_core variant (`#21 <https://github.com/ros2/variants/issues/21>`_)
+* Contributors: Shane Loretz
+
 0.8.2 (2019-11-13)
 ------------------
 * Added ros2interface to ros_core variant. (`#20 <https://github.com/ros2/variants/issues/20>`_)

@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 <?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
 <package format="2">
   <name>ros_core</name>
-  <version>0.8.2</version>
+  <version>0.8.3</version>
   <description>A package to aggregate the packages required to use publish / subscribe, services, generate messages and other core ROS concepts.</description>
   <maintainer email="steven@openrobotics.org">Steven! Ragnarök</maintainer>

data.author: sloretz
data.message:
Add action examples to desktop (#9)

Adds C++ action client and server example packages

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,8 @@
   <exec_depend>tlsf_cpp</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- examples repo -->
+  <exec_depend>examples_rclcpp_minimal_action_client</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>examples_rclcpp_minimal_action_server</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>examples_rclcpp_minimal_client</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>examples_rclcpp_minimal_composition</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>examples_rclcpp_minimal_publisher</exec_depend>

data.author: slessans
data.message: Added missing dependency for ros2actions package for ros2cli (#12)

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@
   <exec_depend>common_interfaces</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- ros2cli repo -->
+  <exec_depend>ros2action</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2launch</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2lifecycle</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2msg</exec_depend>

data.author: ruffsl
data.message:
Add sros2 to ros-core (#10)

* Include sros2 as a exec_depend ros-core

Facilitate default security by including sros2 in the CLI provided through ros-core

* Remove duplicate exec_depend in ros-core from desktop

Signed-off-by: Steven! Ragnarök <steven@nuclearsandwich.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,8 +54,6 @@
   <exec_depend>examples_rclpy_minimal_service</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>examples_rclpy_minimal_subscriber</exec_depend>
 
-  <!-- sros2 repo -->
-  <exec_depend>sros2</exec_depend>
   <export>
     <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
   </export>

@@ -59,6 +59,7 @@
   <exec_depend>ros2service</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2srv</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2topic</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>sros2</exec_depend>
 
   <!-- class_loader repo -->
   <exec_depend>class_loader</exec_depend>

@@ -51,6 +51,7 @@
   <exec_depend>ros2launch</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2lifecycle</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2msg</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>ros2multicast</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2node</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2param</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>ros2pkg</exec_depend>
